quotes: Tone may flex slightly by context; core voice never changes.

rules.intent: Keep messaging consistently confident, warm, and clear across all content while allowing contextual tone flexibility without altering the underlying brand voice.
rules.rule_text: Brand voice rests on three pillars: confident, not boastful (state first-of-its-kind significance clearly, never overstated or sensationalized); warm, not overly emotional (genuine empathy for patients' daily impact, patients centered); and clear, not complicated (plain, respectful, accurate language). Tone may flex slightly by context, but the core voice must never change.
